summaryAm: ትንሽ ጓደኛ እንኳን ትልቅ እርዳታ ሊያደርግ እንደሚችል የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ደግነት በትንሽም በትልቅም ልብ ውስጥ ይኖራል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የአንበሳው እና የአይጡ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Lion and the Mouse story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle lion resting under an acacia tree while a tiny mouse approaches kindly.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ የደግነትን እና የመርዳትን ሀሳብ ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the kindness and helping moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tiny mouse helping the lion with a calm, child-friendly expression.

pages.textEn: The story will end with friendship and gratitude.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The lion and mouse smiling together as friends in warm storybook light.
